transfer.user.posixprofile.Gid.Description: The POSIX group ID used for all EFS operations by this user.

transfer.user.posixprofile.SecondaryGids.Description: The secondary POSIX group IDs used for all EFS operations by this user.

transfer.user.posixprofile.Uid.Description: The POSIX user ID used for all EFS operations by this user.
